parameters.query: SELECT platform_comment_id FROM social_comments WHERE fetched_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'No new comments to reply to', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO social_comments (platform, platform_comment_id, commenter_name, comment_text, reply_text, replied, replied_at) VALUES ('facebook', $1, $2, $3, $4, true, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (platform_comment_id) DO NOTHING;
